title: 9 million cats
description: Fun modpack with random and fun mods that enhance gameplay.
body:
All of these mods are made by their respective creators, not by me or any other person/s. The mods included are all well made (in my opinion) and are fun to play with. Feel free to do whatever you want with this, I don't own anything.

Lots of quality of life and funny, random mods are included. But also biomes, and world generation changes, as well as many structures too. Food and drinks are in here, as well as a farming mod. Some extra mobs, and re-skins too. There are new ores and armours, tools, weapons, and special stuff mixed in. Lots of new processes and a way to enhance your character beyond it's gear. Also 3 shaders I picked, but you can always use your own. 

Theres much more included but that's the jist. I reccomend browsing the mod list to see all of the amazing mods that are featured. Anyways, I hope someone has as much fun playing this as I did.
